definition: sum value of the oscillation ranges of the vibration at all frequencies except the rotation frequency of the shaft under consideration, expressed as displacement

definition_ml.en: sum value of the oscillation ranges of the vibration at all frequencies except the rotation frequency of the shaft under consideration, expressed as displacement
definition_ml.de: Summenwert der Schwingungsbreiten der Vibration bei allen Frequenzen außer der Drehfrequenz der betrachteten Welle, ausgedrückt als Schwingweg

note: Regularly, only the frequency range below the rotational frequency is considered.

note_ml.en: Regularly, only the frequency range below the rotational frequency is considered.
note_ml.de: In der Regel wird lediglich der Frequenzbereich unterhalb der Drehfrequenz betrachtet.
